categories.name: Liberty
categories.description: Secure the Blessings of Liberty (U.S. Constitution, Preamble)

followUps.statement: How important is individual freedom to you?

challenges.title: Hate speech should be protected as free expression
challenges.body: Consider where you draw the line between protecting speech and preventing harm.

challenges.title: Deliberate lies for personal gain should be protected as speech
challenges.body: Consider whether potential harms might justify limits on this freedom.

challenges.title: Political lies should receive special protection during elections
challenges.body: Consider whether rules should differ for politicians, campaigns, and ordinary citizens.

challenges.title: Government regulation is the best approach to combat online misinformation
challenges.body: Consider alternative approaches: platform rules, media literacy programs, or minimal intervention.

challenges.title: Preventing harm justifies restricting some forms of speech
challenges.body: Consider what types of speech might cross the line and require restriction.

followUps.statement: How important is the right to personal choice without government interference?

challenges.title: Personal choice should be absolute regardless of potential harm to self
challenges.body: Consider whether individuals should be free to make choices that may harm themselves.

challenges.title: Government should protect individuals from their own harmful choices
challenges.body: Consider whether the state has a duty to prevent people from making self-destructive decisions.

followUps.statement: How important is economic freedom and independence for individuals?
How important is the protection of personal rights and privacy?

categories.name: Equality
categories.description: All men are created equal (Declaration of Independence, paragraph 2)

followUps.statement: How important is ensuring everyone has an equal opportunity to succeed?

challenges.title: Providing extra support to disadvantaged groups is worth the added investment
challenges.body: Consider whether offering additional tutoring, grants, or mentorship keeps opportunity truly equal.

followUps.statement: How important is reducing significant differences in wealth and income?
How important is having a legal system that treats everyone fairly and equally?
How important is providing additional support to disadvantaged groups?

categories.name: Community
categories.description: Form a more perfect Union (U.S. Constitution, Preamble)

followUps.statement: How important is a strong sense of shared identity in a group?

challenges.title: Strong communities should fund shared spaces even when personal costs rise
challenges.body: Consider whether investing in public gathering places is worth modest tax increases.

followUps.statement: How important is the belief that people should help each other in times of need?
How important are shared traditions and common values to you?
How important is social cohesion and a sense of belonging?

categories.name: Prosperity
categories.description: Promote the general Welfare (U.S. Constitution, Preamble)

followUps.statement: How important is continuous economic growth and development?

challenges.title: Prioritizing economic growth is worth short-term inequality if it raises overall prosperity
challenges.body: Consider whether accepting temporary gaps in outcomes is acceptable to keep the economy expanding.

followUps.statement: How important is personal financial success and wealth accumulation?
How important is a society's overall efficiency and productivity?
How important is a strong economy to your sense of well-being?

categories.name: Security
categories.description: Provide for the common defence (U.S. Constitution, Preamble)

followUps.statement: How important is personal safety and freedom from crime?

challenges.title: Expanding surveillance is acceptable when it clearly prevents serious harm
challenges.body: Consider whether trading some privacy for stronger protection feels worthwhile to you.

followUps.statement: How important is economic stability and predictability?
How important is a strong national defense and protection from external threats?
How important is having a stable and predictable social environment?
How important is a fair and transparent decision-making process?

challenges.title: It is better to slow decisions down if that keeps the process transparent for everyone
challenges.body: Consider whether full transparency is worth delays when outcomes feel urgent.

followUps.statement: How important is ensuring that rewards and resources are distributed justly?
How important is it that the legal system focuses on rehabilitation rather than just punishment?
How important is it that all people are treated without bias?

categories.name: Sustainability
categories.description: To ourselves and our Posterity (U.S. Constitution, Preamble)

followUps.statement: How important is protecting the natural environment for future generations?

challenges.title: Limiting certain conveniences today is worth it to protect future generations
challenges.body: Consider whether reducing some consumption now feels justified to preserve long-term resources.

followUps.statement: How important is ensuring long-term economic resilience?
How important is it to be mindful of how our actions affect those who come after us?
How important is the conservation of resources?
